---
title: "Assessing the energy implication of political intervention"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2011). Assessing the energy implication of political intervention."
date: "2011-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_assessing_2011a"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://www.theoildrum.com/node/7798#more"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This work evaluates how policy decisions and political interventions influence energy consumption patterns and efficiency measures. It discusses the relationship between governance frameworks and sustainable energy transitions."
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2011

[URL](http://www.theoildrum.com/node/7798#more) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This work evaluates how policy decisions and political interventions influence energy consumption patterns and efficiency measures. It discusses the relationship between governance frameworks and sustainable energy transitions.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2011). Assessing the energy implication of political intervention.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{lovelace_assessing_2011a,
	title = {Assessing the energy implication of political intervention},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://www.theoildrum.com/node/7798#more},
	abstract = {This work evaluates how policy decisions and political interventions influence energy consumption patterns and efficiency measures. It discusses the relationship between governance frameworks and sustainable energy transitions.},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2011},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
